seoTitle: How to Add a Link in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Add clickable hyperlinks to text or images in Canva to drive traffic to your website, social profiles, or landing pages.
intro: Turning a design into something interactive is as simple as adding a link, which is especially useful for driving traffic from presentations or graphics to your website or social profiles. This guide walks through the steps to add a hyperlink in Canva. It's aimed at marketers and content creators who want their designs to do more than just look good.

steps.heading: Select the text or image
steps.body: Choose the element in your design that you want to turn into a clickable link.

steps.heading: Add the link
steps.body: Enter the destination URL through Canva's link option for that element.

steps.heading: Test with a practical example
steps.body: Preview or click the link to confirm it directs to the correct page.

steps.heading: Apply links across your project
steps.body: Repeat for other elements like buttons or images where you want to drive traffic.

faq.question: Do links work in downloaded PDF designs?
faq.answer: Yes, links typically remain clickable when a Canva design is exported as a PDF.

faq.question: Can I link to social media profiles as well as websites?
faq.answer: Yes, any valid URL, including social profile links, can be added the same way.

faq.question: Will adding a link change how my design looks?
faq.answer: No, links are attached to existing text or images without altering their appearance.
